subject: feat(backend): migrate to sancio_ prefixed tables and tool-till-tees API
body:
Shared Supabase database requires prefixed table names to avoid collisions
with other projects. Invitation emails now route through tool-till-tees
SMTP endpoint instead of Supabase Resend edge function.

- Rename all table references from unprefixed to sancio_ prefix
- Rename all RPC calls to sancio_ prefixed function names
- Add migration to drop unprefixed tables and create business logic on sancio_ tables
- Replace send-invitation edge function with tool-till-tees API call
- Update config.toml: remove deprecated [project] section, bump major_version to 17
- Update .env.example with VITE_API_BASE_URL

Tags: backend, database, migration, api, cleanup
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: high
Debt: paid
Epic: backend-migration
Semver: major

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
title: migrate to sancio_ prefixed tables and tool-till-tees API
